#
# Dependency set for the PyTorch smoke env ([env.smoke-pytorch] in pyve.toml),
# which runs the PyTorch-specific tests.
#
# The editable install pulls ModelFoundry's base runtime closure plus the
# [pytorch] extra (torch / torchvision / torchmetrics / torchinfo) straight from
# pyproject.toml — referenced, not hand-copied, so the two never drift. The pytest
# tooling below is the test-runner subset of requirements-dev.txt (pytest-cov is
# required because pyproject's [tool.pytest.ini_options] addopts enables --cov on
# every run).
-e .[pytorch]
pytest
pytest-cov
hypothesis
